title: sat: dff output changes without clock edge

features.name: dff_primitive_undef_propagation
features.description: Code should include a DFF primitive instantiation where the D input transitions to undefined while the clock is stable and inactive

features.name: assume_clock_low_constraint
features.description: Code should include an assume property with a negated clock signal to constrain the clock to be inactive

features.name: assert_q_not_unknown
features.description: Code should include an assert property checking that a DFF output is never unknown

features.name: sat_solver_with_undef_tracking
features.description: Code should include a SAT solver command with undef tracking enabled and sequential depth to verify formal properties
